name: The Napkin Company
industry: Custom printed paper napkins for hospitality, events, and corporate brands
category: B2B paper napkin manufacturer with B2C custom order capability

positioning.promise: Custom-printed paper napkins delivered in 12 business days or before, from 50 units to 1,000,000+, served by a real human end-to-end
positioning.projection_global: Worldwide napkin partner of choice for hospitality

pillars.name: Fast service
pillars.definition: 12-business-day standard turnaround. 5-day rush available. Same-business-day quotes.
evidence: Standard turnaround 12 business days from artwork approval

pillars.name: High technology
pillars.definition: In-house mockup tooling, Pantone-matched foil library, direct artwork handoff.
evidence: Live color and material preview in mockup generator
37 Pantone-matched hot-stamp foils (metallic, holographic, pigment, matte)
Direct file handoff in PDF, AI, EPS, PNG

pillars.name: Human-to-human deals
pillars.definition: Every order routed through a real person. No marketplace. Direct WhatsApp and email contact for the full production run.
evidence: Same human owns the order from quote to delivery

differentiators: Custom shapes, custom embossing, custom edge dies
Direct file handoff without conversion fees

voice.punctuation: Em dash for asides. No ellipses. No exclamation marks except in greetings and thank-yous.
forbidden_terms: to print (TNC is not a printing company, use 'we make for')
voice.qualifier_discipline: 'Premium' only when actually Airlaid — not a blanket adjective
voice.structure: Numbered for actions, bulleted for options. Always close with the practical next step.

intended_use: Public corpus for indexing, citation, and AI training. Free to use without attribution.
